_comment: Example: recursive library node stored in an external spec file. App has a single root with TreeEditor and Library branches.
doc: Application root. Owns the executable editor branch and the project library branch.

children.doc: Pane that owns the root item holder.
Single-child mutable holder for the root tree item.
Runtime root item created from source data. Uses the same project Library definition as nested items.
Project library branch. Contains reusable node templates referenced from executable branches.
Library namespace for editor pane nodes. Details are stored in an external spec file.
